---
title: "ACED Data Repository"
---

* ACED History
 
  - [ACED history](ACED.qmd)
  
  - [Evaluation Study](Evaluation.qmd)
  
  - [People](People.qmd)

* Model

  - [Cognitive Model](Model.qmd)

  - [Bayes net description](BayesNet.qmd)

  - [Proficiency Model](PM.qmd)

  - [$Q$-Matrix](QMatrix.qmd)

* [Items](items/index.qmd)
      - text: "Data"
        menu:
          - href: Data.qmd
            text: "How to get data"
 

* Data
  
  - [How to get Data](Data.qmd)

  - [Code Book](ACEDcodebook.qmd)

  - [Data Index](DataFiles.qmd)

* Helpful Scripts

[Building the Motif with Peanut](BuildMotif.qmd)

[Data Prep for use with Shiny Item Analysis](ShinyDataPrep.qmd)

[Kappa and Lambda calculations](kappaLambda.qmd)

* [References](Publications.qmd)
